prompt: Simple centered icon asset, bold silhouette, minimal detail, high contrast, readable at small sizes. A single polished mobile app shortcut icon for a Chinese teacher app, representing a school report dashboard. Center one compact light-skeuomorphic object: two softly stacked white report sheets with a small cyan-to-blue bar chart and one subtle circular data marker, viewed from a gentle upper-front angle. Place the object inside a warm white rounded-square app tile with a very pale cool-lilac edge haze. Soft top-left studio lighting, subtle ambient occlusion, delicate contact shadow, smooth satin material, softly beveled edges, pastel cyan, turquoise and periwinkle accents. Friendly, refined, professional education-tool feeling. The symbol must remain instantly recognizable at 48px. Generous balanced padding, centered composition, no text, no letters, no numbers. Match a premium soft 3D educational icon family, restrained rather than toy-like. Avoid: text, Chinese characters, English letters, numbers, watermark, logo, multiple icons, full UI screen, dark background, harsh shadow, glossy plastic toy, photorealism, excessive detail, thick outline, neon, orange dominance, clutter, cropped object, asymmetric tile.
